TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Katanka Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Katanka a niyaro', 415 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,143 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 29% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 327 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 71% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 816 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 26%, Bunun 4%, Truku 15%, Tayal 2%.
S.PHON: katanka itiniaj i xin ¶ńß…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u katanka a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u **%, taja…ĺ *%.
S.FORM: Katanka Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Katanka a niyaro', 415 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,143 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 29% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 327 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 71% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 816 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 26%, Bunun 4%, Truku 15%, Tayal 2%.
S.PHON: katanka itiniaj i xin ¶ńß…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u katanka a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u **%, taja…ĺ *%.
